title: Diamond Star Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids for Candy Buffet - Apothecary Jars for Bathroom, Candy Bar, Kitchen, Large
description:
About this item
Tall Glass Apothecary Jar really stands out on your candy store countertops. Dimensions: 15.5inches (H) x 6.5 inches (D).
☛Beautiful Shape☚ These footed classic style apothecary jars are made from high-quality clear glass and perfect for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more. They has a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for easy opening and closing.
☛A must-have for wedding candy buffet tables☚ These beautifully decorated jars will add a touch of elegance to your wedding or home. They are the right size to showcase cookies, candy, treats, honey, fudge, spices, baths salts or other delightful treats of your choice
☛Wide range of uses☚ This large glass Apothecary jar is versatile and also can be used with decor items. It looks great with petals, water, sand, pine cones, maples leaves or flowers to add jubilant energy flows into your environment
☛GUARANTEED☚ If the glass jar is broken during transportation, please contact us and we will provide you with a replacement at the first time.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
Looks like it shows on the picture. Really cute. I wanted something nice to put my creamer pods in my cubicle for my morning coffee and it’s perfect. I got a lot of compliments on it. It fits a box of creamers well. I thought of putting a combo of ferrero rochers in my other one I purchased. Great buy. Will buy more. Looks classy and the glass is good quality and blown well. Not like a dollar store glass.I opened my package and everything inside of it was broken I'm very upset very sad disappointed and now I don't have what I ordered or wanted!Very nice dish, had to return only because it wasn’t suitable for candy buffet.Pretty and elegant, very good quality and the packaging was wow!! Highly recommended!It's not super thick glass but should hold up if using appropriately. Very beautiful ! Makes a great focal point on counter or on table. Holds quite a bit and nice large size. Make great gift if you ordered it and fill with goodies. Packaging is lack luster (well packaged to not break) for gift but items great! I've now bought several sizes and shapes... very pleased with these.The purchase/ arrival time was great, only 1 day.
Product was most carefully packaged to assure no broken glass.
Purchased to fill with sand and sea shells as a gift for remembering a vacation at the beach, I wish I had taken a picture it turned out great! Recipient was very pleased.It fits perfect with everything else in my bathroom & it’s the perfect size. It’s not some cheap acrylic knock off.Great for the holidays to store candyI bought this jar because I wanted something pretty to hold the ties that come with my Liberty of London Tana Lawn fabric pieces that I buy to make English Paper Pieced quilts. The Lawn is a fine, pretty, expensive fabric and they tie the bundles with long strips of the fabric. One day I will sew the narrow strips together and make something small from them, but in the meantime, I wanted to be able enjoy them in my sewing room.I’m always nervous about ordering glass items however, this arrived perfect. It’s well-made and my candy looks beautiful. Sitting on my desk.!
reviews_1s: I ordered this item on 12/21/ 2024. I thought very beautiful and perfect jar for displaying my own picked shells from vacation. But I received first one on 12/24 and it was completely shattered. I ordered replacement and it came on 12/30. It was partially shattered again. So I decided to not order for replacement anymore and just get refund.This is made of fine glass, the cover is heaver than the jar. I purchased two; one came shattered and the other one shattered two weeks after purchase. Very poorly made. DO NOT PURCHASE WAIST OF MONEY.Shipping box intact. Packing intact. Item was shipped with a chip in the top of the jar. Also apparent scratches in the middle of the jar. Tried to show in pics. Damage did not happen in transit, was shipped this wayI was extremely disappointed... This shipped with two others that appeared to be fine except this small jar REAKED OF CIGARETTES and had aged throughout the lid and inside the jar. Absolutely disgusting! That wasn't the worst of it, the LID WOULDN'T FIT ... It was too small when I washed everything out trying to salvage it... I'm not sure why I was desperate to try and save it knowing it was used somehow but after I got nauseous because the smell lingered, I have up and the it away. Absolutely horrified.Product was received brokenTo see so many nice reviews, I was dissatisfied. The one that I have is not stable on any surface, wobbles. It came dusty. Sure, it's cute, just not as expected. The edges around the top and the edges around the mouth of the jar feel somewhat rough.Pulling the zoom you will be able to see the quality of the material, very poor, full of bubbles and it came dirty, I cleaned it to make the bubbles visible in the photo, I didn't like it.The vase arrived broken so I had to get a refund, not packed well at all. Too bad because I really liked the fact that the vase had a lid.I opened the box and it smelled rancid. It was covered in a sticky pile that made it cloudy and it also came with no lid. I bought this for sanitary make up sponges, and it’s it DISGUSTING instead.I received this product today and washed and dried it, excited to fill it with Q-tips and display it in my bathroom. I am so disappointed! The lid does NOT fit! I mean not even close to fitting. If the seller would like to make this right I will change my review to 5 star. So sad it is a dud.
